series_description: The form containing the information required under Division (A) of Section 102.02 of the Revised Code to be filed with the Ohio Ethics Commission by certain elected and appointed public officials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current year and 2 prior years in office

series_description: An opinion rendered by virtue of the authority granted in Section 102.08 of the Revised Code to the Ohio Ethics Commission, relating to a specific set of circumstances invloving ethics, conflicts of interest, or financial disclosure; they may also carry immunity from prosecution, suit, or removal from office.
retention_statement: Paper: Permanent, with one copy of each Advisory Opinion transferred to State Archive

series_description: Correspondence relating to Advisory Opinions rendered pursuant to Section 102.08 of the Revised Code.
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years after opinion is rendered

series_title: Staff and Informal Advisory Opinions and Related R
series_description: Opinions rendered by Commission or Staff by virtue of the authority granted to the Ethics Commission in R.C. 102.08, and the underlying request for advice, supporting documents and core reference materials relating to the opinions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain permanently

series_description: Records of persons who have been appointed as members of the Ethics Commission, pursuant to Section 102.05 of the Revised Code
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years from date Commissioner resigns or term expires

series_description: Minutes of Commission Meetings
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain permanently

series_description: Records of present or former employees of the Ethics Commission
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after employee leaves agency employment;

series_description: Payroll files from the Ethics Commission; warrant & disbursement records related to payroll; time logs, leave requests, pay period information and related documents contained in payroll files maintained by the agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved (at least 3 years)

series_description: Records of authorizations for expenditures including travel expenses, office equipment, backup documentation such as purchase orders, vouchers, ISTVs, invoices, postal records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office until audits have been completed and audit reports released

series_description: Records pertaining to formal complaints filed with or by the Commission alleging violations of Chapter 102, 2921.42 or 2921.43 of the Revised Code.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years after date of disposition, destroy

series_description: Records pertaining to formal investigations conducted by the Commission with regard to alleged violations of Chapter 102, 2921.42 or 2921.43 of the Ohio Revised Code.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years after date of disposition

series_description: Records pertaining to investigations conducted by the Commission, other than those in Schedule Number OEC-10 and INV-021, telephone calls regarding past conduct, and the investigative telephone log.
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years after date of disposition ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after date of disposition

series_description: Files containing related legislation and materials garnered from other states which have ethics, conflict of interest, financial disclosure or campaign finance laws.
retention_statement: Paper: Destroy when no longer of any administrative value to the Commission

series_description: Press Releases issued by the Agency
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years from date of release

series_description: Hard copies of relevant news media articles that are not otherwise stored electronically.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years;

series_description: Lists of positions wtihin the agency by position control number
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Copy of program code, program flowcharts, maintenance logs, system change notices, design documents, specifications, and other records that document computer programs and the modifications made to computer programs.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until all data in system has been migrated or destroyed; ; Electronic: Retain until all data in system has been migrated or destroyed;

series_description: Printed Matter published for distribution to the public
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of RC 149.11; destroy excess copies when superseded or no longer of administrative value

series_description: Includes mailing lists, directories and rosters
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: A form used to identify the length of time a record must be retained before final disposition
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Form used to certify the destruction or transfer of records according to the approved records retention schedule
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years

series_description: Formal and informal opinions issued to state agencies
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value to the agency

series_description: Records documenting requests for installation, modification, maintenance or repair of office equipment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Service records, maintenance reports, warranty statements, operation manuals, accident reports, and related documents
retention_statement: Paper: Retain during agency ownership of the vehicle

series_description: Form used to transfer appropriations at SAC Level
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Records of policies including those covering access and security, data retention and disposition
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded or obsolete;

series_description: Reports and records from OGS detailing charges for use of computer services including monthly billing reports and related documents
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Records necessary for using computer systems, user guides, program descriptions and documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 years after discontinuance of system/program and until all system data is destroyed or transferred to new operating environment

series_description: Publications produced detailing operations and/or procedures of the agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Chartes required for budget purposes and other agency administration
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded and otherwise of no administrative value;

series_description: Documents used to order printing jobs from State Printing and for encumbering funds
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Copies of audit reports issued by the Auditor of State to the agency and related documents
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years;

series_description: Fax records, cover letters, enclosures, emails sent in response to advisory inquiries; not related to opinions issued
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years;

series_description: Research materials and memoranda maintained by Advisory staff related to specific areas of relevance to the Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 years;

series_description: Includes worksheets and information used to draft rules/JCARR proceedings, transcripts of public hearings and related records/correspondence
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after rule published

series_description: Contract encumbrances, procurements, complaints, and related contract documents
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after contract expires

series_description: Records pertaining to lease of office space for agency
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after expiration of lease;

series_description: Invoices and logs of long distance calls made by agency personnel and related records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Records documenting lists of attendees and related records for Continuing Legal Education sessions presented by agency
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years after the presentation; ; Paper: Retain 2 years after the presentation;

series_description: Logs, receipts, quarterly reports and related documents depicting petty cash activity.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Documents used to establish information about a vendor in CAS
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Applications, affidavits and related documents for replacement warrants, cancellation or voiding of warrants
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Includes miscellaneous internal and external letters and memos that are informative in nature and do not influence agency policy; incl. routine responses to public records requests or inquires that are handled by standard form responses.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year;

series_description: Includes telephone messages, post-it notes, appointment/speech files, drafts, emails, duplicate copies, notes and other document which serve to convey information of limited temporary importance.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Copies of master files or databases, application software, logs, directories and other records needed to restore a system in case of disaster or inadvertent destruction
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for a minimum of 12 monthly backup cycles and

series_title: System Users Access Records & Computer Usage Files
series_description: Electronic or textual records created to control or monitor individual access to or usage of a system and its data created for security/monitoring purposes, including but not limited to user account records, system usage files, security logs and password files.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value to the agency;

series_description: Copies of State and Federal legislation of interest to the Commission
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years;

series_description: Documents representing requests for agency presentations
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years;

series_description: Forms used to transfer appropriations at SAC level
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Requests forms for copies of financial disclosure statements
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year;

series_title: Advisory Program Form Letters, Dockets & Administr
series_description: Advisory Program acknowledgement & transmittal letters, advisory dockets and request reports, advisory committee related correspondence & agendas, and preparatory research memoranda.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 3 years; ; Paper: Retain for 3 years;

series_description: Computer generated reports distributed by OBM to agency
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Correspondence and related documents representing requests for extension and/or waiver of filing requirement or late fee assessment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after final disposition;

series_description: Copies of ballot results used to update Financial Disclosure Database
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after election;

series_title: Financial Disclosure Correspondence to Elicit Fili
series_description: Copies of Financial Disclosure Reminder letters and other correspondence used to elicit compliance prior to deadline.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until filings received and no longer of administrative value;

series_description: Correspondence generated by Financial Disclosure Staff regarding deadline reminders, warnings of non-compliance and return of incomplete filings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after final disposition

series_description: Miscellaneous letters to filers regarding financial disclosure, but not in connection with any enforcement process
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year;

series_description: Logs maintained by various agency personnel to record incoming calls, record intake, or document telephone conversations/consultations
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years;

series_description: Worksheets (draft and final) and related documents regarding updating lists of required filers in database
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 6 years;

series_description: Agency information technology plans and related records used to plan for information systems development and technology acquisition
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Vacancy positions, applications, resumes, civil service applications, interview documents and related reocrds for persons not hired
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after the position is filled or decision not to fill is made

series_description: Files regarding Worker''s Compensation claims paid to employees of agency
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years from date of last activity

series_description: Worksheets and other records used for proposed budgets, legislative and related documents
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after the biennium

series_description: Documents used to request Controlling Board approval for certain expenditures
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_description: Documents and worksheets relating to the allocation and/or proposed disbursement of fiscal year/biennial funds.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved;

series_title: Bid Documents RFPs RFQs & Related Records
series_description: Purchasing, personal service bid documents, RFPs, RFQs and supporting documentation
retention_statement: Paper: For purchase of goods, retain 5 years

series_description: Research and analysis prepared by staff related to pertinent legislation
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Office copies of filings made on behalf of agency staff or agency to the Joint Legislative Ethics Committee
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years;

series_description: Position Descriptions for agency positions
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded or obsolete;

series_description: Listing of employees including seniority dates and credits
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years;

series_description: Correspondence of the Executive Director dealing with significant aspects of the administration, concerning agency policies, procedures, programs, fiscal and personnel matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years; ; Electronic: Retain 5 years;

series_title: Cash In Treasury Reenue Deposit Records
series_description: Ledgers & logs documenting cash receipts and expenditures. Revenue receipts, logs and supporting documentation; copies of checks, ISTV documents etc. to support revenue deposits.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until applicable fiscal period has been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Records used in the procurement of system hardware and software
retention_statement: Paper: For purchase of goods, retain 5 years

series_description: General correspondence and memos of the Commission Members.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years; ; Electronic: Retain 5 years;

series_title: Deputy Registrar Political Contribution Disclosure Statements
series_description: Deputy Registrar Political Contribution Disclosure Statements from 1989 through 1992.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until law requiring filing with the Ohio Ethics Commission is superseded or repealed

series_description: Statements, correspondence and communications relating to statements filed pursuant to Section 102.04(D) of the Revised Code.
retention_statement: Paper: 10 years after statement is filed ; Electronic: 10 years after statement is filed
